offer: For Amazon sellers processing 10–50 orders/week, poor inventory monitoring causes stockouts. We send weekly alerts when reorder points are met instead of manual tracking with spreadsheets.
problem: Inability to effectively monitor inventory levels and reorder points.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Amazon sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Amazon sellers with demo video
Community forums for Amazon sellers sharing tools
try_it: Let users try weekly alerts and customizable reorder thresholds on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
